'''Foamwander Spa''' was a spa adjoining the [[Hutt Chuba's]] restaurant in [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. It was a good spot to meet [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] on the desert planet.
